At Sunrise Child Care Center

We Believe In Making Learning Fun!

Welcome

About Us

We are an educational child care program that loves and nurtures our students as they learn and develop new skills.

Learn More

Our Approach

Our program includes various forms of learning so that children remain engaged throughout the day.

Learn More

Our Classes

We offer small class sizes in order to be able to give our students more focused attention. We have 5 classrooms and accept children ages 6 weeks to 5 years.

Learn More

"Nothing lights up a child's brain like play."

-Dr. Stuart Brown

Communication is KEY!

At Sunrise Child Care Center we believe that communication is key to a wonderful experience for parents and children! We want to you to be fully informed about what your child is learning and doing while they are with us. To sign up for our email list to get information about what is going on at Sunrise please complete the form below.

What the Parents Say

After being on maternity leave for over 3 months, my time being at home before going back to work was quickly coming to an end. I didn’t want to send my sweet 3 month old baby to just anywhere. I had struggled for months finding a daycare that was safe and nurturing and one that felt like home to my little one. Ethier they were great and had no openings or they had openings and I was hesitant of the care. I work for the Blount County Chamber of Commerce and Sunrise Childcare became a member. As soon as I heard about them I called to schedule a tour. I walked in and had nothing but comfort and peace about Sunrise. The rooms are amazing and safe, the staff are exceptional and treat your littles as their own, and my son comes home happy every single day! The ladies at Sunrise are now family and we wouldn’t want to be anywhere else! If you don’t have a daycare or are looking for one, definitely make Sunrise Childcare a must to check out!

Ashlee D.

Filled starFilled starFilled starFilled starFilled star

We love everyone at Sunrise! My grandson loves his classroom and always has stories about his adventures at school. It's such a joy walking into his room and seeing the smile on his face.

Mindie T.

Filled starFilled starFilled starFilled starFilled star

We love Kacey and the whole staff at sunrise! My littles are so happy and are learning so much!! Definitely blessed for finding this gem!

Leah L.

Filled starFilled starFilled starFilled starFilled star

Sunrise childcare center is the absolute best! They have an awesome curriculum that keeps the children sincerely engaged and learning. After my son started attending around 1.5 years old, he started saying triple the amount of words, singing songs, going potty in the toilet, sleeping better through the night, and learned how to play with other children.
The staff genuinely cares about the well-being of your child and has their best interest at heart. All too many times, I would find my son cuddling or giving hugs to his teacher when I came to pick him up for the day (which is saying a lot because he is usually shy towards others).
Nothing can replace the calmness you feel knowing that your child is in good hands while you have to be away. Thank you, Sunrise Child Care! Highly recommend.

Brittany T.

Filled starFilled starFilled starFilled starFilled star

This place is AMAZING! As a former officer and very picky and paranoid parent, this place met all my expectations!!! I was blown away before even entering the place. Safety of the children is a huge concern, along with education and love for the children they have the opportunity to take care of! Seriously, look no further, THEY HAVE IT!!!!!

Nikki M.

Filled starFilled starFilled starFilled starFilled star

If you are looking for a childcare facility with a staff that truly cares for your child as if they were their own then you’ve found the place! What we saw when we toured the facility far surpassed our expectations. As soon as you enter the building you’re greeted by a bulletin board with information on their weekly menu, a program calendar of themed activities and special days, as well as upcoming events. The teacher to child ratios are small to ensure one-on-one interaction with each child, which was evident during our visit to each classroom. The playground is beautifully manicured and the rooms are mindfully arranged with age appropriate play areas and tons of new toys. Our favorite thing about this facility that sets it apart from others is their use of the Brightwheel app, which sends updates throughout the day directly to my phone. I get information on how much/what they ate, potty details, and nap times. I can also message the teacher directly through the app, which saves everyone time! I think any parent can appreciate the peace of mind you get when you can see how your little one’s day is going in real time rather than waiting until the end of the day to hear about it. The director and assistant director are always friendly and clearly knowledgeable about how to run a daycare. The teachers are absolutely spectacular at what they do, which is obvious in how much the kids love them! If you want a place that treats you like family, make Sunrise Childcare your new home.

Kaylea T.

Filled starFilled starFilled starFilled starFilled star

Let’s Connect

If you are interested in enrolling your child, please call or email us to schedule a tour! We would love the opportunity to meet with you and be a part of your child's life.
